blockingIssues.description: scripts/src/market-maker-test.ts uses the same account for maker and taker flow; matching engine self-trade prevention skips same-owner matches so required taker-fill simulation is not reliable.
scripts/src/market-maker-test.ts treats transaction success as fill success, but market orders can commit with zero trades; the script can report a successful fill without an executed trade.
api/src/indexer/event-indexer.ts testnet/devnet fallback polls /accounts/{contract}/transactions only, which can miss user-submitted transactions and cause stale orderbook/trade/candle state.

appliedUpdates.description: Added command entries for buy-simulation and market-maker-test scripts.
Added matching-self-trade-prevention.md documenting same-owner match prevention and fill-verification requirement for simulations.
Updated aptos-events-v1-deprecation.md with caveat that contract-account transaction polling misses user-submitted module events.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update backend-worker skill to clarify that strict test-first expectations may not apply to live-chain integration scripts requiring funded accounts and external state; require alternative verification strategy when deterministic tests are impractical.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: buy-simulation-script handoff documented deviation from test-first process due to live testnet dependencies; reviewer observed this as a recurring mismatch for operational scripts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add Aptos indexer deprecation guidance and safe fallback constraints to backend-worker skill, including explicit warning that /accounts/{contract}/transactions is not complete event coverage.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: frontend-testnet-connection implemented account-transaction polling fallback that can miss user-generated events; reviewer flagged this as blocking integration correctness.
